priorities.purpose: install proof authority, activation baseline, and same-transaction roadmap continuity
decompose every core and material subordinate claim into typed falsifiable proof obligations
rationalize every existing theorem and target, retire proof bloat, and build semantically adequate formal models, countermodels, traces, composition theorems, and runtime refinement
implement integrated governed work, learning, and assurance reference slices
run informative signature causal campaigns for governance, routing, deliberation, update, unlearning, rollback, residual honesty, situated world-model acquisition, and memory consolidation
complete the formal, executable, empirical, causal, transfer, source, and normative program for all claim families
reproduce strong current baselines and adjudicate exact SOTA challenges
reconcile all 55 live chapters and evidence surfaces with actual results and counterevidence while preserving the 54-chapter activation baseline
disposition reader formats and releases and freeze the evidence-reconciled public state
produce and maintain the under-10000-word X Article synopsis and exact 5:2 header, record publication disposition, and activate the next roadmap

milestones.purpose: complete existing-proof rationalization and formal semantic depth
adjudicate routing and deliberation with a mixed bounded effect and no support promotion
adjudicate update and unlearning causality with a terminal bounded claim narrowing and no support promotion

complete residual/verifier-capacity, situated-world-model/consolidation, KERC canonical-language/hierarchical-residual, the claim-family terminal-disposition audit, and one competent natural-work or end-to-end bundle per family
complete external reproduction and SOTA challenges
complete the maintained X Article synopsis, exact 5:2 header, crosswalk, and current-composer preflight
record article publication or ready-not-published status and close with terminal records and an active successor

non_claims: Roadmap activation does not prove or promote any chapter claim.
Roadmap activation does not establish a beyond-state-of-the-art result.
Validation, theorem, source, citation, format, commit, and release counts are not semantic or empirical proof.
Internal evaluator separation is not independent external-human review.
No external-human prepublication review or outreach is required or claimed.
Roadmap activation does not publish a release, approve a reader format, create a tag, deploy a site, grant rights, or change a license.
Roadmap activation does not create, upload, publish, edit, or authorize the future X Article synopsis or header.
Roadmap activation does not establish model quality, safety, AGI, or ASI.

The author-supplied pre-1995 simulation thought experiment is design-hypothesis intake only: it does not establish that reality is simulated, that historical works intentionally encoded the ASI Stack, or that any personal date has technical or evidentiary significance.
